Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9738 "SANTASCHRISTMASCAPERS-3900-9738" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$86 sta $01 jsr $3900 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Santa's Christmas Capers.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $3900 which: 1. Turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to run correctly 2. Sets the processor port data direction register ($00) to $FF 3. Sets the processor port ($01) to $86
Note: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $376B. However the true start address is $9738.
